tasks.label: worktree:create-multi-agent
tasks.command: git fetch --all --prune; git worktree add -b feature/${input:feature}/planner .worktrees/${input:feature}/planner ${input:base}; git worktree add -b feature/${input:feature}/implementer .worktrees/${input:feature}/implementer ${input:base}; git worktree add -b feature/${input:feature}/tester .worktrees/${input:feature}/tester ${input:base}

tasks.label: worktree:status-multi-agent
tasks.command: git -C .worktrees/${input:feature}/planner status --short --branch; git -C .worktrees/${input:feature}/implementer status --short --branch; git -C .worktrees/${input:feature}/tester status --short --branch

tasks.label: worktree:remove-multi-agent-safe
tasks.command: git worktree remove .worktrees/${input:feature}/planner; git worktree remove .worktrees/${input:feature}/implementer; git worktree remove .worktrees/${input:feature}/tester; git branch -d feature/${input:feature}/planner; git branch -d feature/${input:feature}/implementer; git branch -d feature/${input:feature}/tester

tasks.label: worktree:remove-multi-agent-force
tasks.command: git worktree remove --force .worktrees/${input:feature}/planner; git worktree remove --force .worktrees/${input:feature}/implementer; git worktree remove --force .worktrees/${input:feature}/tester; git branch -D feature/${input:feature}/planner; git branch -D feature/${input:feature}/implementer; git branch -D feature/${input:feature}/tester
